14	// RecoveryFailureClass categorises the persistent failure mode that exhausted

21		// missing-acceptance review verdict.
22		SpecGap RecoveryFailureClass = "spec_gap"

43		Attempted     bool
44		Succeeded     bool
45		Path          RecoveryPath

61	// PostLadderExhaustionHook is called when the consecutive_ladder_exhaustions
62	// counter for a bead reaches the auto-recovery threshold (>= 2). It should
63	// attempt automated recovery and return the outcome. A nil hook or a result
64	// with Attempted=false causes the caller to fall through to the existing loop
65	// path unchanged.
66	type PostLadderExhaustionHook func(ctx context.Context, beadID string, failureClass RecoveryFailureClass) (*PostLadderExhaustionResult, error)
67	
68	// NewAutoRecoveryPostLadderExhaustionHook creates the production recovery hook.
69	// Persistent execution failures try reframe first and decompose second; too-large
70	// failures go straight to decompose; spec gaps use reframe only.
71	func NewAutoRecoveryPostLadderExhaustionHook(store ExecuteBeadLoopStore, runner AgentRunner, rcfg config.ResolvedConfig, projectRoot string, cfg AutoRecoveryConfig) PostLadderExhaustionHook {
72		return func(ctx context.Context, beadID string, failureClass RecoveryFailureClass) (*PostLadderExhaustionResult, error) {
73			state := autoRecoveryState{store: store, beadID: beadID, cfg: cfg}
74			switch failureClass {
75			case SpecGap:
76				return state.runReframe(ctx, store, runner, rcfg, projectRoot)
77			case TooLarge:
78				return state.runDecompose(ctx, store, runner, rcfg, projectRoot)
79			default:
80				reframeResult, err := state.runReframe(ctx, store, runner, rcfg, projectRoot)
81				if err != nil || (reframeResult != nil && reframeResult.Succeeded) {
82					return reframeResult, err
83				}
84				decomposeResult, err := state.runDecompose(ctx, store, runner, rcfg, projectRoot)
85				if err != nil || (decomposeResult != nil && decomposeResult.Succeeded) {
86					return decomposeResult, err
87				}
88				if decomposeResult != nil && decomposeResult.OutcomeReason != "" {
89					return decomposeResult, nil
90				}
91				return state.parkFailed("both_failed", "")
92			}
93		}
94	}

98		beadID string

103	func (s *autoRecoveryState) runReframe(ctx context.Context, store ExecuteBeadLoopStore, runner AgentRunner, rcfg config.ResolvedConfig, projectRoot string) (*PostLadderExhaustionResult, error) {
104		result := runReframer(ctx, store, runner, rcfg, projectRoot, s.beadID)
105		return s.recoveryResult(Reframe, result.Failed, result.CostUSD, result.Reason)
106	}

108	func (s *autoRecoveryState) runDecompose(ctx context.Context, store ExecuteBeadLoopStore, runner AgentRunner, rcfg config.ResolvedConfig, projectRoot string) (*PostLadderExhaustionResult, error) {
109		result := runDecomposer(ctx, store, runner, rcfg, projectRoot, s.beadID)
110		return s.recoveryResult(Decompose, result.Failed, result.CostUSD, result.Reason)
111	}
112	
113	func (s *autoRecoveryState) recoveryResult(path RecoveryPath, failed bool, costUSD float64, reason string) (*PostLadderExhaustionResult, error) {
114		s.total += costUSD
115		if detail, tripped := s.perBeadBudgetTripped(); tripped {
116			_ = s.store.AppendEvent(s.beadID, bead.BeadEvent{
117				Kind:      "per-bead-budget-exhausted",
118				Summary:   "per-bead cost budget exhausted during automated recovery",
119				Body:      detail,
120				Actor:     "ddx work",
121				Source:    "ddx work",
122				CreatedAt: time.Now().UTC(),
123			})
124			return &PostLadderExhaustionResult{
125				Attempted:     true,
126				Succeeded:     false,
127				Path:          path,
128				CostUSD:       s.total,
129				OutcomeReason: escalation.PerBeadBudgetExhaustedReason,
130			}, nil
131		}
132		if s.maxRecoveryCostTripped() {
133			return s.parkFailed("circuit-breaker", reason)
134		}
135		return &PostLadderExhaustionResult{
136			Attempted: true,
137			Succeeded: !failed,
138			Path:      path,
139			CostUSD:   s.total,
140		}, nil
141	}
142	
143	func (s *autoRecoveryState) perBeadBudgetTripped() (string, bool) {
144		if s.cfg.MaxBeadCostUSD <= 0 || s.total < s.cfg.MaxBeadCostUSD {
145			return "", false
146		}
147		return escalation.PerBeadBudgetExhaustedReason + " during automated recovery", true
148	}
149	
150	func (s *autoRecoveryState) maxRecoveryCostTripped() bool {
151		return s.cfg.MaxRecoveryCostUSD > 0 && s.total > s.cfg.MaxRecoveryCostUSD
152	}
153	
154	func (s *autoRecoveryState) parkFailed(reason, detail string) (*PostLadderExhaustionResult, error) {
155		body, _ := json.Marshal(autoRecoveryFailedEventBody{
156			Reason:       reason,
157			TotalCostUSD: s.total,
158			Detail:       detail,
159		})
160		_ = s.store.AppendEvent(s.beadID, bead.BeadEvent{
161			Kind:      "auto-recovery-failed",
162			Summary:   reason,
163			Body:      string(body),
164			Actor:     "ddx work",
165			Source:    "ddx work",
166			CreatedAt: time.Now().UTC(),
167		})
168		err := s.store.ParkToProposed(s.beadID, bead.ParkAutoRecoveryFailed, func(b *bead.Bead) {
169			bead.SetNeedsHumanMeta(b, bead.NeedsHumanMeta{
170				Reason: reason,
171				Since:  time.Now().UTC().Format(time.RFC3339),
172				Source: "ddx work",
173			})
174		})
175		return &PostLadderExhaustionResult{
176			Attempted:     true,
177			Succeeded:     false,
178			CostUSD:       s.total,
179			OutcomeReason: reason,
180		}, err
181	}

152	func (r ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime) loopIntent() (executeloop.Mode, time.Duration) {
153		mode := r.Mode
154		if mode == "" {
155			if r.Once {
156				mode = executeloop.ModeOnce
157			} else {
158				mode = executeloop.ModeDrain
159			}
160		}
161		idleInterval := r.IdleInterval
162		if idleInterval == 0 && mode == executeloop.ModeWatch {
163			idleInterval = r.PollInterval
164		}
165		if idleInterval == 0 && mode == executeloop.ModeWatch {
166			idleInterval = 30 * time.Second
167		}
168		return mode, idleInterval
169	}

175	// long enough not to false-trip a slow-but-healthy resolver.
176	const DefaultRouteResolutionTimeout = 60 * time.Second
177

179	// timeout, falling back to DefaultRouteResolutionTimeout when unset.
180	func (r ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime) effectiveRouteResolutionTimeout() time.Duration {

706	// decodePreClaimIntakePayloadResult decodes a JSON payload into a PreClaimIntakeResult.
707	// It accepts both the legacy intake schema (classification field) and the canonical
708	// readiness schema (outcome field), converting both into the same decision model.
709	func decodePreClaimIntakePayloadResult(payload string) (PreClaimIntakeResult, error) {
710		return decodePreClaimIntakePayloadResultWithMode(payload, config.BeadQualityModeWarnOnly)
711	}
712	
713	func decodePreClaimIntakePayloadResultWithMode(payload string, qualityMode string) (PreClaimIntakeResult, error) {
714		var probe struct {
715			Classification  string                                 `json:"classification"`
716			Outcome         string                                 `json:"outcome"`
717			Tractability    string                                 `json:"tractability"`
718			Rationale       string                                 `json:"rationale"`
719			Score           preClaimReadinessScore                 `json:"score"`
720			Difficulty      preClaimReadinessDifficulty            `json:"difficulty"`
721			ReadinessChecks preClaimReadinessChecksPayload         `json:"readiness_checks"`
722			SuggestedFixes  preClaimReadinessSuggestedFixesPayload `json:"suggested_fixes"`
723		}
724		if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(payload), &probe); err != nil {
725			return PreClaimIntakeResult{}, fmt.Errorf("pre-claim intake: decode result: %w", err)
726		}
727		if probe.Outcome != "" {
728			return decodeCanonicalReadinessPayloadWithMode(payload, qualityMode)
729		}
730		if probe.Classification != "" {
731			if isReadinessClassificationPayload(probe.Classification, probe.Tractability, probe.Rationale, probe.Score.Present, normalizeReadinessEstimatedDifficulty(probe.Difficulty.EstimatedDifficulty) != "", probe.ReadinessChecks.Present, probe.ReadinessChecks.Len(), len(probe.SuggestedFixes)) {
732				return decodeReadinessClassificationPayloadWithMode(payload, qualityMode)
733			}
734			return decodeLegacyIntakePayload(payload)
735		}
736		return PreClaimIntakeResult{}, fmt.Errorf("pre-claim intake: missing classification or outcome field")
737	}
738	
739	func isReadinessClassificationPayload(classification, tractability, rationale string, scorePresent, difficultyPresent bool, readinessChecksPresent bool, checkCount, fixCount int) bool {
740		switch strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(classification)) {
741		case ReadinessClassificationSystemUnready,
742			"readiness_error",
743			"intake_error",
744			ReadinessClassificationNeedsRefine,
745			ReadinessClassificationNeedsSplit,
746			ReadinessClassificationOperatorRequired,
747			"ambiguous",
748			"safely_refinable",
749			"split":
750			return true
751		case "ready":
752			return readinessChecksPresent ||
753				strings.TrimSpace(tractability) != "" ||
754				strings.TrimSpace(rationale) != "" ||
755				scorePresent ||
756				difficultyPresent ||
757				checkCount > 0 ||
758				fixCount > 0
759		default:
760			return false
761		}
762	}
763	
764	func decodeCanonicalReadinessPayloadWithMode(payload string, qualityMode string) (PreClaimIntakeResult, error) {
765		var out preClaimReadinessPromptResult
766		if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(payload), &out); err != nil {
767			return PreClaimIntakeResult{}, fmt.Errorf("pre-claim intake: decode readiness result: %w", err)
768		}
769		detail := strings.TrimSpace(out.Reason)
770		if detail == "" {
771			detail = strings.TrimSpace(out.Detail)
772		}
773		rewrite := PreClaimIntakeRewrite{
774			Description:   strings.TrimSpace(out.Rewrite.Description),
775			Acceptance:    strings.TrimSpace(out.Rewrite.Acceptance),
776			ChangedFields: normalizePreClaimIntakeRewriteFields(out.Rewrite.ChangedFields),
777		}
778		estimatedDifficulty := normalizeReadinessEstimatedDifficulty(out.Difficulty.EstimatedDifficulty)
779		switch strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(out.Outcome)) {
780		case "actionable_atomic":
781			return PreClaimIntakeResult{Outcome: PreClaimIntakeActionableAtomic, Detail: detail, EstimatedDifficulty: estimatedDifficulty}, nil
782		case "actionable_but_rewritten":
783			return PreClaimIntakeResult{Outcome: PreClaimIntakeActionableButRewritten, Detail: detail, EstimatedDifficulty: estimatedDifficulty, Rewrite: rewrite}, nil
784		case "too_large_decomposed":
785			return PreClaimIntakeResult{Outcome: PreClaimIntakeTooLargeDecomposed, Reason: ReadinessReasonTooLarge, Detail: detail, EstimatedDifficulty: estimatedDifficulty}, nil
786		case "operator_required", "human_review_required":
787			return PreClaimIntakeResult{Outcome: PreClaimIntakeOperatorRequired, Reason: ReadinessReasonAmbiguousScope, Detail: detail, EstimatedDifficulty: estimatedDifficulty}, nil
788		case "ambiguous_needs_human", "needs_human":
789			return PreClaimIntakeResult{}, fmt.Errorf("pre-claim intake: legacy readiness outcome %q removed by lifecycle migration; use %q", out.Outcome, PreClaimIntakeOperatorRequired)
790		case "readiness_error", "system_unready":
791			// system_unready maps to fail-open/skip per ADR-023/FEAT-010 policy
792			classified := ClassifyReadinessWithMode(ReadinessClassificationSystemUnready, nil, detail, qualityMode)
793			return PreClaimIntakeResult{
794				Outcome:      PreClaimIntakeError,
795				Reason:       classified.Reason,
796				SystemReason: classified.SystemReason,
797				Detail:       detail,
798			}, nil
799		case "":
800			return PreClaimIntakeResult{}, fmt.Errorf("pre-claim intake: missing outcome")
801		default:
802			return PreClaimIntakeResult{}, fmt.Errorf("pre-claim intake: unknown readiness outcome %q: expected one of actionable_atomic, actionable_but_rewritten, too_large_decomposed, operator_required, readiness_error, system_unready", out.Outcome)
803		}
804	}
